evals.prompt: 配置圖上標 3F 的柱子，在 ETABS 應該放在哪層？
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader-floors. Explain +1 rule: plan 3F column = ETABS 4F column, because columns belong to their top story.

evals.prompt: 這個區域四面有梁但有打叉叉，要不要建板？
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader-floors. Reference decision matrix: 4-sided beams + X mark = structural opening = do NOT build slab.

evals.prompt: 屋突層 R1F 到 PRF 的構件配置要怎麼決定？
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader-floors. Explain: R1F uses top floor config, R2F+ extends core grid area to PRF. Ask user for core grid range.
